description: Real-time prediction market orderbook data API for Polymarket. REST, WebSocket, and MCP server access to crypto, sports, economics, and weather market data at ~20Hz.
rules: Always include the X-API-Key header for authenticated endpoints
WebSocket auth must happen within 5 seconds via message, not query string
API keys are prefixed with rm_
Each market has UP and DOWN tokens with separate orderbooks
Snapshots include both eventTimestamp and captureTimestamp for latency measurement
UP + DOWN token prices don't always sum to 1.00 — the spread accounts for the difference
Sequence number gaps may be intentional (throttling at 50ms or dedup), not data loss
SOL slug prefix varies: sol- for short timeframes, solana- for hourly/daily
Rate limits are per tier: Free 60/min, Pro 500/min, Enterprise 3000/min
Historical data access is tier-gated: Free 1h, Pro 30d, Enterprise full archive
